name: tumipay-ms-payment-provider-template-tests
description: Integration tests for tumipay-ms-payment-provider-template using Newman

scripts.test:all: newman run ./collections/payin_collection.json -e ./enviroments/local_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export ./reports/report-payin.html && newman run ./collections/payout_collection.json -e ./enviroments/local_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export ./reports/report-payout.html && newman run ./collections/query_collection.json -e ./enviroments/local_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export ./reports/report-query.html && newman run ./collections/webhook_collection.json -e ./enviroments/local_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export ./reports/report-webhook.html
scripts.test:all:ci: newman run ./collections/payin_collection.json -e ./enviroments/local_environment.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export ./reports/report-payin.json --bail && newman run ./collections/payout_collection.json -e ./enviroments/local_environment.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export ./reports/report-payout.json --bail && newman run ./collections/query_collection.json -e ./enviroments/local_environment.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export ./reports/report-query.json --bail && newman run ./collections/webhook_collection.json -e ./enviroments/local_environment.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export ./reports/report-webhook.json --bail

author: TumiPay Architect Team
